hero.subtitle: Build a beautiful personal website in minutes and showcase your work like a professional. Completely free for designers, developers, photographers and creators who care about craft.
hero.smallPrint: Free forever · No credit card required · No subscriptions

trusted.kicker: Built for freelancers, designers & developers worldwide
trusted.line: Portfolio Pro is a brand-new platform — join our growing community of creators shaping it from day one.

product.title: A real product, not a mockup.
product.sub: Take a peek inside the dashboard and the drag-and-drop builder.

compare.title: Different from Behance, Wix and Squarespace.
compare.sub: They're great at what they do. We're laser-focused on one thing: getting your work in front of the right people.

features.title: Everything you need to look professional.
features.sub: Designed end-to-end so your work looks as good as it really is.

dnd.d: Compose sections like Lego blocks. Reorder, restyle, and ship in minutes.

tpl.d: Dozens of award-winning templates crafted by senior designers.

dom.d: Use portfoliopro.com/you or connect a custom domain in one click.

an.d: Track views, sources, and engagement on every project you publish.

ai.d: Write better case studies with an assistant trained on great portfolios.

seo.d: Auto-generated meta, OG cards and sitemaps so clients find you on Google.

whyfree.title: Built for creators, not for shareholders.
whyfree.sub: Portfolio Pro is a passion project. Here's how we keep it free — sustainably.

b1.d: The builder, templates, hosting, and analytics stay free — no paywalled essentials.

b2.d: Down the road, optional Pro features (custom domain, team seats, advanced analytics) will fund the free core.

b3.d: No hidden upsells, no forced watermarks, no lock-in. You always own and can export your content.

faq.title: Answers before you ask.
faq.a1: Yes. Every feature, every template, forever.
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card?
faq.a2: No. Sign up with an email and start building.
faq.q3: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a3: Yes — connect a custom domain in one click.
faq.a4: Portfolio Pro is designed and developed by Zyad Abdou.

cta.title: Your portfolio, in minutes.
cta.sub: Join thousands of creators. Ship a portfolio you're proud of, today.

footer.tagline: Build your professional presence. Impress every client. Completely free.

auth.verifySent: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.

about.p1: Portfolio Pro is the portfolio platform we always wished existed — beautiful by default, ridiculously fast, and completely free. No subscriptions, no upsells, no dark patterns.
about.p2: Whether you're a developer, designer, photographer, video editor, AI creator or freelancer — you deserve a portfolio that looks like it cost ten thousand dollars to build. Now it costs nothing.
about.credit: Crafted with care for the creative community.
